name: Saint George the Dragon Slayer - Ally

system.biography: Saint George the Dragon Slayer is a legendary holy knight who wanders Broken Europe hunting monsters and Dark Presences. His story is tragic: as a child, George befriended a young Dragon in the mountains. Years later, when plague struck his village, George begged the Dragon to help save his people. The Dragon, bound by ancient laws forbidding interference in human affairs, refused. George watched helplessly as his family and neighbors died. Consumed by grief and rage at this perceived betrayal, George dedicated his life to becoming a holy knight. He trained relentlessly, mastering combat and learning to resist magic. When ready, he returned and executed the Dragon who had once been his friend. The Church canonized him as Saint George the Dragon Slayer, but the weight of killing his childhood friend left deep scars on his soul. What George doesn't know is that his entire story was orchestrated by the One Who Plots in the Shadows, who twisted a tale of friendship into one of betrayal and violence. Now Saint George can appear as either ally or opponent to the Hunters, depending on their actions. As an ally, he fights alongside them against genuine threats while carefully observing their moral choices. He accumulates Judgment Tokens when Hunters use Dark Ego or magic for good deeds—when enough Tokens accumulate, he admits he was wrong and becomes a permanent ally.
descriptors: I am a legendary dragon slayer and holy knight of the Church
I hunt monsters and Dark Presences to protect humanity
The memory of my Dragon friend haunts me
I watch to determine if Hunters are heroes or monsters

gifts.name: The Holy Dragon Slayer
gifts.description: Saint George wields a blessed sword that once slew his Dragon friend. When fighting against creatures with monstrous, magical, or supernatural Descriptors, Saint George can spend 1 Fervor Token to inflict 1 additional Wound beyond normal damage, or 1 Wound even if the target succeeds on their Defense Check. The only way to avoid this Wound is to have an Outcome with Increment and spend it to nullify the Gift's effect. Saint George regenerates Fervor Tokens equal to the number of Hunters at the beginning of each Scenario when acting as an ally.

gifts.name: The Judgment of the Saint
gifts.description: Saint George keeps everyone under observation, even when fighting alongside the Hunters. During a Scene, if a Hunter activates their Dark Ego to perform a good deed, or uses any Gift that allows them to use magic or manipulate ordinary people to do good in Saint George's presence, he adds 1 Judgment Token to this Gift. Judgment Tokens carry over between Scenarios. When Judgment Tokens equal twice the number of Hunters, Saint George makes amends, declaring he was wrong in his judgment, and puts an end to any Witch Hunt, becoming a permanent ally. Examples: Using Dark Ego to save innocent lives, employing magic to heal/protect the helpless, manipulating nobles to bring justice, sacrificing personal gain to help others.

agenda: Eliminate Broken Tales that threaten innocent people
Determine if the Hunters are truly heroes or simply monsters
Find redemption for killing my childhood friend
system.notes: Saint George is a RECURRING campaign element who can transition between ally and opponent based on Hunter actions. Track Fervor Tokens (combat resource) and Judgment Tokens (redemption mechanic) secretly. He can appear in multiple scenarios, building tension over time. If Hunters discover his manipulated past and appeal to his Dragon friend's memory, reduce OL by 1 for that Scene as his resolve wavers. Connection to One Who Plots in the Shadows makes him a bridge to discovering the true enemy. Voice: Noble and commanding, but with underlying sadness. Mannerisms: Touches his sword hilt when troubled, distant gaze.
